policies.enrollmentScheduleControl: The signed Enrollment Summary and Service Schedule controls the selected tier, term, monthly rate, exact Hollis-provided services, Hollis-billed add-ons, and any separately billed third-party items.
policies.autoRenewal: After the initial term, membership converts to month-to-month unless either party gives at least 30 days' written notice of non-renewal.
policies.noticePeriod: 30 days' written notice before the end of the initial term or month-to-month termination date.
policies.pauseRights: Only if expressly permitted in the signed Membership Agreement or an approved written addendum; the signed agreement controls duration, billing effect, and term-extension effect.
policies.earlyTermination: If the member terminates early other than an approved or legally required cancellation, the remaining discounted contract value through the end date remains due as stated in the signed Membership Agreement.
policies.thirdPartyDisclosure: Independent physician, laboratory, imaging, pharmacy, and other third-party clinical charges are excluded from Hollis Health membership fees and may be billed separately by the applicable independent provider.
policies.partnerFacilityDisclosure: Hollis Health is not a medical provider, does not practice medicine, and does not bill for or sell medical services. Members receive medical care from independent licensed providers of their choosing, including providers in the Hollis referral network.

ESSENTIALS.publicDescription: A foundational wellness membership with weekly private coaching sessions, recovery access, care coordination support, and full access to your health progress dashboard.

CORE.publicDescription: Three private coaching sessions per week with expanded nutrition coaching, recovery access, priority care coordination, and biomarker-informed planning when outside labs are shared with consent.

CONCIERGE.publicDescription: Our most comprehensive membership: five private coaching sessions per week, dedicated care coordination support, recovery access, nutrition coaching, and dashboard integration for outside medical data shared with consent.

values.ESSENTIALS: Infrared sauna, cold plunge, red light
values.CORE: Infrared sauna, cold plunge, red light
values.CONCIERGE: Infrared sauna, cold plunge, red light

separatelyBilledThirdPartyItems: Medical consultations and clinical evaluations with independent providers
Laboratory panels, lab draw fees, and laboratory interpretation by independent providers
DEXA scans, imaging, CGM sensors, IV therapy, and related services furnished by independent providers
Specialist referrals or services outside the scope of the membership program
Supplements and retail products unless expressly listed as included on the Enrollment Summary and Service Schedule
Any other service furnished by an independent third party
